## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Browser behavior checked when the interface changed

## Screenshots

Add before/after screenshots for visual changes. Remove this section when it does not apply.

## Privacy and security

- [ ] No credentials, private user data, personal paths, logs, or local workspace files are included
